name: Tortilla Crusted Snapper with Cilantro-Lime S
recipeInstructions:
1. Dust both sides of the fillets with flour.
2. Dip each fillet in beaten eggs.
3. Coat the fillets firmly with corn tortilla strips.
4. Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
5. Saute the fillets for 40 seconds on each side.
6. Transfer to a baking dish.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 7-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
8. Serve with Cilantro-Lime Salsa on the side.
